description: Account of building operations ca. 1200. Fragment of a leaf, upper left part, in a calligraphic hand. It itemizes mainly work in clay, and the work of a mason. The period covered in the account as preserved is less than a week, from Monday to Thursday. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 391 #104)
description_he: חשבון עבודות בנייה, כ-1200. פירוט עבודות חימר ובנייה מיום שני עד חמישי.
